ORDER DATED JULY 21, 2008 ON REQUEST TO ADVANCE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING IS "DENIED". THE CASE REMAINS SET ON ORIGINAL DATE. 1) THE CURRENT TRIAL WAS SET AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. 2) PLAINTIFF MAY REQUEST TRIAL BY WRITTEN DECLARATION, OR APPEAARANCE BY TELEPHONE IN LIEU OF PERSONAL APPAEARANCE. 3) THE PARTIES ARE ENCOURAGED TO SUBMIT TO MEDIATION TO RESOLVE THIS CASE, PER COMMISSSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, ZHE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOO, ELAINE $776.77 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $856.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2008 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SOO, ELAINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHEN, ZHE DEDUCTIONS FOR DAMAGES OR REPAIRS CLAIM BY DEFENDANT ARE REFLECTED IN THE JUDGMENT ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
